/usr/bin/ar qc IRIS_V2_artefacts/Release/libIRIS2_SharedCode.a CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/Source/V2/PluginProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/Source/V2/PluginEditor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/Source/V2/RoomMapComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/Source/V2/ControlPanelComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/Source/V2/IRListComponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_extra/juce_gui_extra.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Harfbuzz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Sheenbidi.c.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_events/juce_events.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless_ara.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless_lv2_libs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_processors_headless/juce_audio_processors_headless.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_utils/juce_audio_utils.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_formats/juce_audio_formats.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_devices/juce_audio_devices.mm.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_osc/juce_osc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IRIS_V2.dir/JUCE/modules/juce_dsp/juce_dsp.mm.o
/usr/bin/ranlib IRIS_V2_artefacts/Release/libIRIS2_SharedCode.a
